channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Week: Trump's Air Strike Diplomacy
Women Report Insufficient Information on Bleeding, Pain, and Mental Distress Before Taking Abortion Pill
item.description: Researchers found that gaps in informed consent and post-abortion care were more common with mail-order mifepristone.

item.title: Alaska Election Official Threatens to Disqualify Republican Candidate Sharing Name with Dan Sullivan
item.description: A top Alaska elections official has threatened to disqualify a U.S. Senate candidate from the August primary who shares the same name and part...

item.title: Disclosure Day: An Unequal Sequel
item.description: Spielberg betrays the movies and himself.
